description: Small multi-hop golden set for the agentic (IRCoT) recall benchmark. Each query needs a two-spec chain: a single-shot search surfaces the FIRST gold spec, whose content names a SECOND spec the question also depends on. goldIds are grounded in the live context-index.sqlite (verified present, is_archived=0). hop2Cue is the entity a competent reasoner would extract from hop-1 results to drive the follow-up search; it is used by the benchmark's scripted oracle reasoner to stand in for a live LLM.

measuredResult.lane: lexical FTS5/BM25 (lower bound vs full hybrid; full hybrid + live-LLM run blocked in this environment — single-writer lock + no chat-capable LLM)
measuredResult.reasoner: oracle (deterministic best-case stand-in; a real LLM may extract a worse second hop)
measuredResult.note: Net Recall@K > 0 on this lane, but interleaving the per-hop union (not concatenating) is required for the lift at K=5; with a naive concatenated union the chained gold ranks past position 5 and net Recall@5 = 0. Per-query LLM cost/latency and real-model reasoner quality are UNMEASURED.

queries.query: how does the bounded agentic recall loop relate to the retrieval evaluation harness it must pass
queries.hop1: agentic tool-loop recall strategy bounded governor
queries.rationale: 016-iterative-agentic-recall (21824) is gated on the 008-retrieval-evaluation harness (21534); answering the relationship needs both specs.

queries.query: what does the maintenance-grace daemon re-election feature build on to stay responsive
queries.hop2Cue: cooperative heavy phases keep the daemon responsive reindex
queries.rationale: 018/019 re-election (22194) builds on the 020/021 cooperative-heavy-phases work (22204) that first made the scan cooperative.

queries.query: how does summary-fusion grounding depend on the world-summary prelude it reranks against
queries.hop2Cue: world summary prelude coarse-to-fine grounding memory_context
queries.rationale: 015-summary-fusion-grounding (21823) grounds on the world-summary prelude described in the 028 parent spec (19819).

queries.query: what determinism foundation does content-addressed derived-id provenance rely on
queries.hop1: content-addressed derived id provenance for causal edges

queries.query: how does retrieval-class routing interact with the graceful-degradation path when channels are suppressed
queries.hop1: retrieval class routing query-shape channel suppression
queries.rationale: 003-retrieval-class-routing (21811) and 004-graceful-degradation (21812) are paired: suppression must degrade gracefully.

queries.query: what consolidation feature does memory retention forgetting coordinate its cursor clock with
queries.hop1: memory retention forgetting safety layer spare-only
